about.title: About Us
about.story: Founded in 2025 in Ireland, we connect trusted local professionals with people needing home services, repairs, lessons, moving, and more. Customers get fast quotes, verified reviews, and secure payments in one streamlined marketplace.
about.mission: Quality, speed and trust in every service request.
about.stats: A growing network of verified Irish professionals across all 26 counties.

serviceDetail.description1: Service usually includes planning, on-site execution, cleanup and final quality checks based on your home or business needs.
serviceDetail.description2: Verified professionals arrive prepared, communicate clearly and adapt scope, materials and timing to your priorities.
serviceDetail.description3: You can request custom quotes for urgent jobs, recurring plans or advanced requirements before confirming your booking.
serviceDetail.faq1q: How quickly can I receive quotes?
serviceDetail.faq1a: Most requests receive the first quote within 30 minutes during business hours.
serviceDetail.faq2a: Profiles are checked with ID and business verification before they can receive leads.
serviceDetail.faq3q: What if I am not satisfied?
serviceDetail.faq3a: Our support team reviews each case. Refund options may apply under our Happiness Pledge terms.

legal.privacyBody: We process account, service request and payment data to match customers with providers, prevent fraud and improve platform reliability. Data is encrypted in transit and access is logged.
legal.termsBody: Providers are responsible for accurate service descriptions, legal compliance and timely delivery. Customers agree to share honest requirements and complete payments through platform-approved flows.
legal.cookieBody: We use essential cookies for sign-in and security, plus analytics cookies to improve search relevance, quote quality and conversion across customer and provider journeys.

contact.name: Full name
contact.success: Your message has been sent. We will respond shortly.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Answers about bookings, quotes, payments and providers.
faqPage.a1: WorkMate connects customers with verified local providers for home and office services such as cleaning, repairs, moving and tutoring.
faqPage.q2: What services can I book on WorkMate?
faqPage.a2: You can request help across many categories including cleaning, painting, moving, repairs, tutoring and event support, depending on provider availability in your area.
faqPage.a3: Create an account, complete your basic profile, post a job with clear details, and wait for offers from matching providers.
faqPage.q4: How much does it cost to post a task?
faqPage.a4: Posting a task is free for customers. You only pay when you choose an offer and proceed with booking and payment.
faqPage.q5: Do I have to hire after posting?
faqPage.a5: No. Posting is not a commitment to hire. You can compare offers and decide later.
faqPage.q6: I posted my task. What happens next?
faqPage.a6: Matching providers receive your request and can send quotes. You can review price, timing, and profile quality before accepting.
faqPage.a7: Payments are processed securely through the platform flow. You can track payment status from your dashboard.
faqPage.q8: How can I contact a provider after accepting an offer?
faqPage.a8: Use the private messaging area linked to the accepted quote to coordinate details such as timing and access.
faqPage.q9: What trust and quality features does WorkMate provide?
faqPage.a9: The platform supports identity checks, provider document review, verified review logic, and activity tracking to improve trust.
faqPage.a10: Yes. You can discuss scope and expectations via private messages. Keep final terms clear before starting work.
faqPage.a11: Only users connected to completed jobs should leave reviews. This helps keep ratings tied to real transactions.
faqPage.q12: How can I check a provider’s history?
faqPage.a12: Review the provider profile, ratings, completed-work evidence, and response details in quote and message history.
faqPage.q13: How should I price my offer as a provider?
faqPage.a13: Base your quote on scope, materials, travel, and duration. Include clear notes on what is included and excluded.
faqPage.q14: What payment options are available for providers?
faqPage.a14: Provider payouts are linked to connected payout setup. Availability depends on account verification and payout configuration.
faqPage.q15: Can I discuss the task before assigning it?
faqPage.a15: Yes. Customers can ask follow-up questions and clarify details before accepting a quote.
faqPage.q16: How do I start working and earning as a provider?
faqPage.a16: To start earning as a provider, create an account, complete provider onboarding, and upload required verification documents. You must be at least 18, legally allowed to work in Ireland, and provide valid identity and professional proof documents. After admin approval, you can start responding to matched leads and sending offers.
faqPage.a17: After payment flow completion and job status progression, payout is handled through the connected account process.
faqPage.q18: How do I cancel a task?
faqPage.a18: Customers can cancel eligible open tasks from their dashboard before work starts. For accepted jobs, follow the status flow and support policy.

retention.title: Data Retention Policy
retention.subtitle: How long we keep your data and why.
retention.p1: Account profile data is stored while your account remains active and for up to 24 months after closure for compliance.
retention.p2: Job requests, quote history and payment records are stored for financial, tax and dispute-resolution obligations.
retention.p3: Support messages are retained for up to 36 months to improve service quality and investigate fraud reports.
